title: Cooldown Manager X
description: Cooldown Manager X ⏱️ – Easily manage command cooldowns, customize messages, and give VIPs/Admins faster access with LuckPerms integration!
body:
Cooldown Manager X⏱️

Take control of your server commands with style and precision!

CooldownManager is a user-friendly, flexible, and light-weight Minecraft plugin that lets you manage command cooldowns like a pro. Whether you want to prevent command spam, reward higher-ranked players, or customize cooldown messages, Cooldown Manager X has you covered.

✨ Key Features

Per-command cooldowns – Set individual cooldowns for each command in seconds.

Rank-based cooldowns – Reward VIPs and Admins with shorter cooldowns using LuckPerms integration.

Flexible message system – Customize all messages with colors, hex codes, and placeholders like {time} and {command}.

Disable or instant commands – Set a cooldown to -1 to completely disable it, or 0 to allow immediate use.

Easy reload – Update your configuration on-the-fly with /cooldownmanager reload or /cm reload.

Why Use Cooldown Manager X?

Protects your server from command spam.

Gives a polished experience for players with rank perks.

Fully configurable without touching the code.

Lightweight, reliable, and compatible with Java 17.

Transform your server commands into a smooth, well-managed system — because every second counts!
